title: rubus procerus f. robustus
intro: Rubus procerus f. robustus, also known as the robust black raspberry, is a variety of bramble native to North America. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include its high antioxidant and anti-inflammatory content, and is known to have antibacterial and antiviral properties. The health benefits of Rubus procerus f. robustus include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and supporting the immune system, as well as having potential anti-cancer properties. The plant can be prepared as a herbal tea, juice, or tincture, with some herbalists also using it in salves and creams for topical applications.
